name: HyWorldVLA: A Vision-Language-Action Model with Hybrid World Modeling for Autonomous Driving
summary: arXiv:2607.20988v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models augmented with world modeling represent a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving. While pixel-lev...
description: arXiv:2607.20988v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models augmented with world modeling represent a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving. While pixel-level future prediction enables fine-grained spatiotemporal reasoning, it compromises robustness in noisy driving scenarios. Conversely, latent-based world models alleviate this sensitivity but often inc...
author: Quanfu Yu, Xian Wu, Hao Xu, Liulong Ma
